title: OCRRA Battery Recycling Site Expansion and Park Memorial Donations
summary: Parks Commissioner presents OCRRA battery recycling program expanding to four community center sites (Southwest, Northeast, Cecil, Magnarelli). Council acknowledges responsiveness to site concerns. Four park donations accepted: $2,000 from Eastwood Neighborhood Association for Cummings Field bench, $1,054 from Syracuse Inner Rotary Club for Kirk Park bench and memorial plaque honoring Al Turner, two $100 TNT donations for Franklin Square plaques honoring Ben Wash and TNT community contributions.
